tagline: End-to-end encrypted messages, disguised as ordinary words.
landing_hero_sub: Your message is encrypted into a string of ordinary words — share it anywhere.
landing_login_link: Already have an account? Log In
landing_step1_desc: Get a unique User ID and Secret Token. A key-pair is generated in your browser — your private key never leaves your device.
landing_step2_desc: Type your message and the recipient's User ID. The app encrypts it into a string of readable words.
landing_step3_desc: Copy the word-string and send it anywhere — WhatsApp, email, a forum post. Only the intended recipient can decode it.
landing_step4_desc: Paste a word-string. If it was encrypted for you, you'll see the original message.
signup_subtitle: Your keys are generated in this browser. Nothing private ever reaches our servers.
signup_id_hint: Share this with people who want to send you messages.
signup_token_warning: ⚠ Save this now. It cannot be recovered if lost. Use it to log in.
signup_key_hint: Keep this file safe. You will need it to decrypt messages if you clear your browser data.
login_key_file_label: Private Key File (optional if saved in browser)
login_key_restored: Private key restored from browser storage.
login_upload_key: Upload your private key file to enable decryption.
compose_user_not_found: Recipient not found. Check the User ID.
decode_not_for_you: This message was not encrypted for you.
decode_invalid: Could not decrypt. The word-string may be corrupted or from a different recipient.
decode_no_key: No private key available. Please upload your key file below.
account_delete_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
account_delete_confirm_label: Enter your Secret Token to confirm
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
